title: Waist-high flooding on Dagupan Street, Tondo
description: Waist-high floodwater along Dagupan Street near Barangay 105. Storm drains overflowing. Multiple families requesting rescue from second-floor windows. Water rising steadily since 0600H.
resolve_note: DSWD rescue boats deployed. 23 families evacuated to Tondo Covered Court. Floodwater receded by 1400H.

title: Road impassable at JP Rizal Ave, Marikina
description: Marikina River breached 18m alarm level. JP Rizal Avenue completely submerged from Barangay Sto. Nino to Industrial Valley. Vehicles stranded. MDRRMO requesting immediate road closure.
resolve_note: River level dropped below 16m. Road cleared by heavy equipment. Traffic rerouted via Marcos Highway until debris removal complete.

title: Knee-deep flooding at Commonwealth Ave underpass, QC
description: Underpass near Tandang Sora intersection flooded knee-deep. Pumping station at Lagro reportedly malfunctioning. Stalled jeepneys blocking both lanes. Commuters wading through floodwater.
resolve_note: Pumping station repaired and operational. Underpass drained within 3 hours. Stalled vehicles towed. Normal traffic flow restored.

title: Flash flood near Rosario Bridge, Pasig City
description: Sudden flash flood reported at Rosario Bridge area, Barangay Rosario. Pasig River water spilling onto C. Raymundo Avenue. Market vendors scrambling to save goods. Water at ankle level and rising.

title: Rising water level in Barangay Catmon, Malabon
description: Residents of Barangay Catmon report water seeping into ground-floor homes. Tullahan River showing brownish discoloration. No visible overflow yet but level unusually high for current rainfall amount.
